library_overview.name: OpenBB Platform
library_overview.description: Open-source financial data platform for analysts, quants and AI agents. Provides 'connect once, consume everywhere' infrastructure layer that consolidates and exposes data to Python environments, OpenBB Workspace, Excel, MCP servers for AI agents, and REST APIs.

python_version_requirements.deprecation_warning: Python 3.9 triggers deprecation warning, will be discontinued fall 2025

installation_commands.minimal_core_only: pip install openbb-core && pip install openbb --no-deps

system_requirements.linux_requirements: Rust and Cargo in PATH, libwebkit2gtk-4.0-dev for Debian-based systems

core_routers.description: Fixed income and bond market data

historical.description: Get historical OHLCV price data for stocks
historical.returns: OBBject with DataFrame containing Open, High, Low, Close, Volume, Adj Close

quote.description: Get the latest quote for a stock including price, volume, and other real-time data

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol, multiple items allowed

quote.returns: Quote data with open, high, low, close, volume, previous close, change, change percent, 52-week high/low

performance.description: Price performance as a return over different time periods

balance.description: Get balance sheet data for a company
balance.returns: Balance sheet with assets, liabilities, equity line items

income.description: Get income statement data for a company
income.returns: Income statement with revenue, expenses, net income line items

cash.description: Get cash flow statement data for a company
cash.returns: Cash flow statement with operating, investing, financing activities

metrics.description: Get key financial metrics for a company

returns.description: Key metrics including ratios and performance indicators

ratios.description: Get financial ratios for a company over time

returns.description: Financial ratios including liquidity, profitability, efficiency, leverage ratios

dividends.description: Get historical dividend data for a company
dividends.returns: Historical dividend payments with dates and amounts

reported_financials.description: Get reported financial statements as filed

profile.returns: Company description, sector, industry, executives, website, address

company_facts.description: Compare reported company facts and fundamental data points across companies

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbols, multiple items allowed

company_facts.returns: Comparison of specified fact across companies

chains.description: Get options chains data with Greeks and implied volatility

returns.description: Options chain data model with comprehensive fields

instruments.description: Get reference data for available futures instruments

curve.returns: Futures curve data showing term structure

gdp.description: Get real GDP data by country

country.description: Country or countries, multiple items allowed

returns.description: Real GDP data with growth rates

country.description: Country or countries, multiple items allowed

transform.description: Transformation of CPI data - period (change since previous), yoy (year over year), mom (month over month)

cpi.returns: CPI index values or rate of change (inflation)

indicators.description: Get economic indicators by country and indicator type

country.description: Country or countries, multiple items allowed

fred_search.description: Search FRED database for series IDs
fred_search.returns: List of FRED series matching search query with series_id

fred_series.description: Get data for a specific FRED series

rates.description: Get US Treasury rates (constant maturity or inflation protected)
rates.returns: Treasury yield curve data by maturity

bonds.returns: Corporate bond pricing and yield data

top_gainers.returns: List of top gaining cryptos with performance metrics

top_losers.returns: List of top losing cryptos with performance metrics

market_cap.description: Get top cryptocurrencies by market capitalization
market_cap.returns: List of top cryptos by market cap

historical.returns: Historical OHLC data for currency pair

search.returns: List of ETFs matching search criteria

technical.note: Requires installation of openbb-technical extension: pip install openbb-technical

target.description: Column to calculate Bollinger Bands on

bbands.returns: Upper band, middle band, lower band

data_provider_configuration.overview: OpenBB uses a multi-provider architecture where each data source is a separate extension. Users can configure API keys for various providers and set provider priority.

configuration_methods.example:
from openbb import obb
obb.user.credentials.fred_api_key = '<YOUR_KEY>'
obb.account.save()

configuration_methods.description: Login to OpenBB Hub, navigate to API Keys section, add keys, then login from Python

available_providers.name: Financial Modeling Prep (FMP)
available_providers.cost: Free tier available, paid tiers for more features

available_providers.name: Polygon.io
available_providers.cost: Free tier available, paid tiers for real-time data
available_providers.features: High-quality market data, tick-level data on paid tiers

available_providers.name: FRED (Federal Reserve Economic Data)
available_providers.features: Comprehensive economic data from Federal Reserve

available_providers.name: SEC
available_providers.features: Official SEC filings and financial data

available_providers.name: Tiingo
available_providers.features: Quality market data with good free tier

available_providers.name: Alpha Vantage
available_providers.features: Good for beginners, rate-limited free tier

available_providers.name: Tradier
available_providers.cost: Free sandbox, paid for live data

provider_priority.description: When provider parameter is omitted, OpenBB uses configured priority list
provider_priority.example: For CPI data: FRED (if API key configured) → OECD (fallback)
provider_priority.configuration: Can be set in user_settings.json or via obb.user.preferences

fmp.process: Free tier with registration, paid tiers available

polygon.process: Free tier with registration, paid tiers for more features

intrinio.process: Contact sales for pricing and access

obb_interface.description: The main entry point for all OpenBB Platform functionality
obb_interface.note: Always use 'from openbb import obb', not 'from openbb.obb.equity import *'

obbject.description: OpenBB's custom return object that wraps data and metadata
methods: to_dataframe() - Convert results to pandas DataFrame
chart() - Display interactive chart (requires charting extension)
show() - Display data in appropriate format
properties: warnings - Any warnings from the request
chart - Chart object if charting is available
obbject.example:
output = obb.equity.price.historical('AAPL')
df = output.to_dataframe()
data = output.results

multi_provider_architecture.description: OpenBB routes requests to integrated data providers. Each provider is a separate extension.
key_points: OpenBB does not store data - it aggregates from providers
Some providers require API keys, others don't
Can specify provider explicitly or use priority list

rest_api.description: OpenBB Platform includes a FastAPI-based REST API
features: Access all OpenBB functionality via HTTP

basic_workflow.step_1: Import OpenBB: from openbb import obb

specifying_providers.fallback: If no provider specified, uses priority list

exploring_available_commands.method_1: Use IDE IntelliSense: type 'obb.equity.' and see suggestions

chaining_operations.description: Fetch data then apply technical analysis
chaining_operations.example:
data = obb.equity.price.historical('AAPL', provider='yfinance')
rsi = obb.technical.rsi(data.results, length=14)

error_handling.check_provider_availability: Ensure API key is configured for provider
error_handling.check_symbol_validity: Use search functions to find valid symbols
error_handling.handle_rate_limits: Free tiers have rate limits, consider paid tiers

implementation_recommendations.recommended_solution: Use obb.equity.price.historical() for price data, obb.equity.fundamental.* for financials, obb.technical.* for indicators
implementation_recommendations.rationale: Comprehensive data coverage with flexible provider options

implementation_recommendations.recommended_solution: Use obb.economy.* functions with FRED provider for US data, OECD for international
implementation_recommendations.rationale: FRED is authoritative source for US economic data, free API

implementation_recommendations.recommended_solution: Use obb.derivatives.options.chains() with Tradier or paid providers
implementation_recommendations.rationale: Options data requires reliable providers with Greeks calculations
Built-in crypto support with multiple provider options

implementation_recommendations.recommended_solution: Use obb.equity.fundamental.metrics() and obb.equity.fundamental.ratios() with FMP provider
implementation_recommendations.rationale: FMP provides comprehensive fundamental data with good free tier

implementation_recommendations.recommended_solution: Install openbb-technical, fetch data with historical(), apply technical indicators
implementation_recommendations.rationale: Full suite of technical indicators with standardized interface

implementation_recommendations.recommended_solution: Use OpenBB REST API with openbb-api command
implementation_recommendations.rationale: Language-agnostic HTTP interface with automatic documentation

implementation_recommendations.recommended_solution: Use OpenBB Workspace Excel integration or export data via Python
implementation_recommendations.rationale: Native Excel integration available in Workspace product

common_pitfalls.symptom: Function not available or returns error
common_pitfalls.solution: Configure API key in user_settings.json or via obb.user.credentials
Use paid tier or implement request throttling
Use search functions to find correct symbol format for provider
Install required extension: pip install openbb-{extension}
Check documentation for provider-specific fields, try different provider
Try alternative providers, paid tiers often have better data quality

best_practices: Always specify provider explicitly for production applications
Use paid tiers for critical applications requiring reliability
Cache frequently accessed data to minimize API calls
Use virtual environments to manage dependencies
Keep extensions updated: pip install --upgrade openbb
Consult provider documentation for data update frequencies
Use OBBject methods for data conversion rather than manual parsing

alternative_implementations.name: yfinance
alternative_implementations.comparison: Single provider (Yahoo Finance), simpler but less flexible

alternative_implementations.name: QuantLib
alternative_implementations.comparison: Quantitative finance library, no data fetching

technical_insights.architecture: Modular provider-agnostic platform with extensions system
performance_considerations: API calls are synchronous by default
Large historical datasets can be memory-intensive
Consider pagination for large result sets

deprecation_notices: Legacy SDK (OpenBB Terminal SDK) deprecated in favor of OpenBB Platform

citations: [8] OpenBB Documentation. 'Authorization and API Keys | OpenBB Docs.' https://docs.openbb.co/platform/getting_started/api_keys
